LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND/OR ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MET ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT BREACHED HIS OBLIGATIONS TO PLAINTIFF UNDER THE EQUIPMENT FINANCING AGREEMENT. (SEE DECLARATION OF LEE IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND/OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF CLAIM 1-7, EXHS. 1-3.) THE BURDEN SHIFTED TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN AS NO OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT YONG JOO LEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $161,945.34. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY CEFALU, MARC T
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
OBJECTION TO DATE AND TIME OF TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-26-2013 IN 206, PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/29/13 IS CONTINUED TO 1/27/14 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
